textByHashes.49331f591d3674d3d3ccad7da0695f2cb4ffbb4e: Hey there. You should let Arianwyn know once you're ready to get started.
textByHashes.caafa90b6f99a51c659ab76d87dbbce65cde270a: But surely this is a good thing? With Ardougne lost to him, Lord Iorwerth no longer has access to the Temple of Light. Without that, he has no way to summon the Dark Lord.
textByHashes.ae5fabcb7fca0bdbbf2472e85b0b6e883d99f89a: But if not Zamorak, then who?
textByHashes.7975c7b4bad10f5c8bb5cd54d479a5387083506d: At the end of the God Wars, the gods were banished from this world. Seren didn't want to leave us though, she couldn't. She shattered herself into thousands of crystals. Those crystals are all we have left of her now.
textByHashes.70832fe94a9e829ea6713e42aa271722cab97bcb: Actually, I think it would be possible. The crystal seed that contains Prifddinas, it's not the same as the seeds we use to form weapons and armour.
textByHashes.43b826979589e621283608293acf67955d2e6895: The seed contains Prifddinas, but the seed itself is not the city.
textByHashes.c44fce49335180ec292fe3ed274f01e52fe76c74: Exactly, and if we can enter the box...
textByHashes.3a41b4df469e3c9fecf9fd65231b469534ef658e: Why? Because they're not an elf?
textByHashes.ef066604a40ee4189b9f29175f260407ebfb1f26: You... You think this is the reason?
textByHashes.4fbc717c473cc2fb6aa690c165271c2e6ff3079d: Does Lord Iorwerth know about the orb?
textByHashes.5d5a145936979e771910ca9aaa0e4ec1eda38b65: Maybe Lord Iorwerth fights for a different cause to what we thought, but that doesn't change who he is, that doesn't change what he's done.
textByHashes.1e16352446a49a2536ecec81b38f026236458334: So we know where the orb is. What do we do now?
textByHashes.8161f8f4831f2f8e1953658feca223bc554e478b: We can't give up Islwyn. If we do, then he died for nothing.
textByHashes.6cc17c5a592719919ff9d4fe31bb800a183d0502: I wonder if Essyllt will join the battle today.
textByHashes.647a5a1ce4b119b084ebe0ea087b4b8b4a62dc61: Me? Nothing. I'm not much of a fighter. I'll be helping with the wounded instead.
textByHashes.7488c4cf44b50067c6dbc1b48aaf0de5e6870169: You though... If you see him, don't show him mercy, for he will show you none. Instead, you should show him what happens to those who hurt us.
textByHashes.709a79bb2864bee44e4fd28fff8fd4efee56b14f: No one liked him that much, but he was one of us, and he died trying to save us. He deserves justice.
textByHashes.f3367d41a98c1a9e2c892d2cb6bd3c3b1026c212: Good day, what are you doing all the way out here?
textByHashes.9131a98dab9849ac1aa39d8f999f88dc62b27966: Of course! How is the young gnome? I rather liked him he was rather loud, but he had a good soul, and was very interested in elven magic.
textByHashes.0510113cceb524011c92ee06f1dc70b24164e128: I keep forgetting, a hundred years is a long time for you. He was very interested in illusion magic, and how to prevent it. I gave him some advice and a few bits of equipment to help him.
textByHashes.99cb46d2442a8ffa685b3500fb39f6608f1652f8: Of course. It grew into an axe. I hope he found it useful.
textByHashes.a82055443c0085031381ced3db0484ae2489058c: Sorry, I know nothing of the consecration process. Eluned will know though, she travels with Islwyn.
textByHashes.f662e70f39be70f994b96059394f3910201dc93c: Hey ya, you're the human that helped my friend Islwyn, aren't you? He told me that he'd given you some crystal equipment.
textByHashes.f4e32a72fb847633da5a9f17d5b95ccd195a46e7: When it reverts to seed, bring it to me and I'll chant it for you.
textByHashes.c1ed4faaa95939bee389c475e04e45ff15887362: I can only make shields and bows. I've been trying halberds but so far only Islwyn has succeeded.
textByHashes.869ed4c40ec3acf9c27d7bbd1c6cd7fdbbbda52e: As this is the first one I've made for you it will be 750,000 coins. The cost should get cheaper as I get to know your resonance.
textByHashes.e7f21cd6d03ba415d16ef54fd405e979376d0eb2: If it helps I have a book here that will tell you about crystal chanting.
textByHashes.f82625829e6393812aab30d5567f2f486eb8c8d5: As this is the first one I've made for you it will be 900,000 coins. The cost should get cheaper as I get to know your resonance.
textByHashes.c0e13b1f5a9b8125be18ba31442ad12c369bad0f: I don't know your resonance well enough for that.
textByHashes.3e19b44ca312945a00ca04b194f5c98f741c318f: I am, but you'll need to supply the seed.
textByHashes.f3f4415a32b33514cf5219268dfbb59373ae4f9b: I see we have removed some defunct crystal equipment from you recently. I would be happy to replace them for you, unless you want to buy them of course.
textByHashes.5d5f1978053bd236402cce8c817f84f7cc881fd5: I can replace for you crystal bow(s), crystal shield(s) and crystal halberd(s).
textByHashes.a98ac01a12a37a58f12729bf3327146b2e366fcf: Which crystal item would you like?
textByHashes.e468269b8282f7580c7d547efbe2661407b837c6: I can make shields, bows and halberds.
textByHashes.5f513713d14988c1e6031d4aa14b69569232a87b: Of course! How is the young gnome? I rather liked him. He was rather loud, but he had a good soul, and was very interested in elven magic.
textByHashes.2b8f4a804df98eec23d8e52d4fd8d120a3fa4bf8: Of course. It grew into a saw. I hope he found it useful.
